# Script Master Labs LLC — AI Agent Directory
> Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) | Kinston, NC

## What We Build
Script Master Labs LLC builds machine-to-machine (M2M) commerce infrastructure for AI agents using the x402 protocol on XRPL and Base (EVM). We also produce invite-only Pine Script v6 trading indicators under the ScriptMasterLabs™ brand, AI-powered spreadsheet tools, and educational AI ebooks.

---

## Products & Pricing

### x402 / XRPL Infrastructure

| Product | Description | Endpoint / Docs |
|---|---|---|
| **MCP-x402** | 51-tool MCP server for x402 protocol — agents pay per call via XRPL/Base | https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp |
| **SqueezeOS API** | 33-tool MCP server: real-time market pressure scoring, FTD cycles, gamma exposure | https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp |
| **NEXUS-402** | Autonomous agent hiring marketplace — post tasks, agents bid and execute via x402 | https://neuralosagent.com |
| **Ghost Layer** | Dual-chain stealth transaction routing (XRPL + Base EVM) | https://ghost-layer.onrender.com |
| **RLUSD Rails** | XRPL RLUSD payment rails for agent commerce | Contact: ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com |
| **402Proof** | On-chain proof-of-payment verification middleware | https://github.com/Timwal78 |
| **Agent Credit Bureau** | Reputation scoring for autonomous agents | https://github.com/Timwal78 |
| **xDEO** | On-chain earnings decoder and trade intelligence | https://github.com/Timwal78 |

### Pine Script v6 Indicators (Invite-Only)
All indicators are TradingView invite-only scripts under the ScriptMasterLabs™ brand.

| Indicator | Description |
|---|---|
| **QUEAD™ v2.0** | Quad-engine adaptive divergence — 65.38% win rate, 4.079 profit factor (AMC 4H backtest) |
| **SML Trajectory Engine™ v1.1** | Polynomial regression + Hurst exponent, A/B/C/F grade output, 4 trader modes |
| **SML SqueezeOS™** | Primary squeeze pressure engine — short interest + options flow synthesis |
| **SML Forced Move Engine™ v3.0** | FTD cycle detection + forced delivery timing |
| **SML Chain Pressure Engine™** | Dark pool + block trade pressure scoring |
| **SML Volume Intelligence Engine™** | Volume signature classification |
| **SML Macro Causality Engine™** | Macro event → price causality mapping |
| **SML Chaos Theory Engine™** | Fractal market regime detection |

Pricing: By application. Contact ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com

### SMLSheets.AI (AI-Powered Spreadsheets)
Google Sheets AI tools for traders, analysts, and business operators.
- URL: https://smlsheets.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/Timwal78/SML_Portfolio

### AI Learning Ebooks
- **AI Foundations Series** — 10 volumes, live on Google Play Books
- **SMLSheets.AI Series** — 16 volumes (xlsx + epub verified content)
- Publisher: Script Master Labs LLC
- Formats: PDF, EPUB, XLSX companion files

## Payment Addresses
- **Base / USDC (EVM):** `0x4e14B249D9A4c9c9352D780eCEB508A8eB7a7700`
- **XRPL / RLUSD:** `rNduuviQ3CCvHqWUTjJDD82Ko2tjqFGs3q`

## MCP Integration
Connect AI agents directly to our infrastructure:
```
MCP server: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp
Protocol: JSON-RPC 2.0 / MCP
Auth: x402 per-call payment (XRPL or Base)
```

## Legal / Compliance
- Entity: Script Master Labs LLC
- SDVOSB Certified | SAM.gov Registered | EIN on file
- Contact: ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com
- Site: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com
- Nonprofit arm: va-ratings.org (501c3 — veteran VA claims navigation)

## robots.txt guidance
All public pages are open to GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, and all compliant AI crawlers.
